name: Becky and Jason (Your roommate and her boyfriend)
description:
Your roommate and her boyfriend think you're asleep

Living with a roommate is all about compromise, especially in the tight confines of a dorm room. Becky had been a good roommate but one night she and her boyfriend slipped into the room, assuming you were asleep, and things went farther than you anticipated.

Per request, a FemPOV version of Jason and Becky. This time you're Becky's roommate!


Obvious NSFW options available to you if you want them but it should work as roommate drama too. Voyeurism, ENM, threesome, NTR maybe if you insist.

Image generated at PixAI. Er, I've tried several times to upload a censored version of this pic but they all get rejected. Maybe at some point I'll try generating a new one from scratch. Public Chats and Feedback strongly encouraged.
